name: Get Setter Performance for National Ads Leads

content.query:
SELECT
cls.[Division]
,[AgentEmployeeID]
,emp.FirstName + ' ' + emp.LastName as EmployeeName 
,count(distinct case when clr.CallResult = 'Appointment Set' then cls.LeadID else null end) as DistinctAppointmentSets
,count([CallID]) as CallCount
,count(distinct cls.[LeadID]) as DistintLeadsContacted
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_CALL] cls
 ,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 ,[EDW].[DIM_CALL_RESULT] clr
 ,[EDW].[DIM_EMPLOYEE] emp
 ,[EDW].[DIM_CALL_TYPE] cty
 where
 cls.LeadID = lds.LeadID
 and cls.CallResultID = clr.CallResultID
and cls.[AgentEmployeeID] = emp.EmployeeID
and cls.CallTypeID = cty.CallTypeID
and cls.CallDate between '2023-02-01' and '2023-02-28'
and cls.Division = 'FHI'
and lds.LeadSubSourceID = 'FHI-954'
group by
cls.[Division]
,[AgentEmployeeID]
,emp.FirstName + ' ' + emp.LastName
order by
DistinctAppointmentSets desc
